blockingIssues.description: CashSwapWidget only maps balances for CASH/USDC while default input token is USD1, so insufficient-balance detection does not trigger for USD1 and CTA state can incorrectly show Swap instead of Insufficient USD1 balance.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented quote-asset balance field mapping gap (`USD1` UI symbol vs backend `usdc` balance field) in .factory/library/cash-quote-balance-field-mapping.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit Vite env guidance to ensure `VITE_*` variables are available at runtime (including `envPrefix: []` gotcha when present) during Next.js -> Vite ports.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Swap-execution handoff reported envPrefix debugging and missing guidance in fork-worker instructions, leading to avoidable integration friction.
